---
title: "Boundaryless"
date: "Last modified: `r format(Sys.time(), '%d-%m-%Y.')`"
output:
  html_document:
    mathjax: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
    highlight: pygments
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide # class.source = "fold-hide" to hide code and add a button to show it
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
    code_download: true
    css: visual.css
always_allow_html: true
bibliography: 
  - references.bib
  - grateful-refs.bib
header-includes:
  - \newcommand{\ar}{\mathbb{R}}
  - \newcommand{\llav}[1]{\left\{#1\right\}}
  - \newcommand{\pare}[1]{\left(#1\right)}
  - \newcommand{\Ncal}{\mathcal{N}}
  - \newcommand{\Vcal}{\mathcal{V}}
  - \newcommand{\Ecal}{\mathcal{E}}
  - \newcommand{\Wcal}{\mathcal{W}}
  - \newcommand{\almosteverywhere}{\mathrm{a.e.}\;}
---

Go back to the [Contents](about.html) page.

<div style="color: #2c3e50; text-align: right;">
********  
<strong>Press Show to reveal the code chunks.</strong>  

********
</div>


Go back to the [About page](about.html).

Let us set some global options for all code chunks in this document.


```{r}
# Create a clipboard button on the rendered HTML page
source(here::here("clipboard.R")); clipboard
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(1200) 
# Set global options for all code chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  # Disable messages printed by R code chunks
  message = FALSE,    
  # Disable warnings printed by R code chunks
  warning = FALSE,    
  # Show R code within code chunks in output
  echo = TRUE,        
  # Include both R code and its results in output
  include = TRUE,     
  # Evaluate R code chunks
  eval = TRUE,       
  # Enable caching of R code chunks for faster rendering
  cache = FALSE,      
  # Align figures in the center of the output
  fig.align = "center",
  # Enable retina display for high-resolution figures
  retina = 2,
  # Show errors in the output instead of stopping rendering
  error = TRUE,
  # Do not collapse code and output into a single block
  collapse = FALSE
)
# Start the figure counter
fig_count <- 0
# Define the captioner function
captioner <- function(caption) {
  fig_count <<- fig_count + 1
  paste0("Figure ", fig_count, ": ", caption)
}
# Define the function to truncate a number to two decimal places
truncate_to_two <- function(x) {
  truncated <- floor(x * 100) / 100
  sprintf("%.2f", truncated)
}
```

# Import libraries

```{r, eval = TRUE}
library(MetricGraph)
library(Matrix)
library(rSPDE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(latex2exp)
library(ggtext)

library(grateful) # Cite all loaded packages
library(here) # here::here() starts from the home directory

library(slackr)
source("keys.R")
slackr_setup(token = token) # token comes from keys.R
```



```{r}
# get the functions from the Rmd files
knitr::purl(here::here("all_functions.Rmd"), output = here::here("all_functions.R"))
knitr::purl(here::here("matern_functions.Rmd"), output = here::here("matern_functions.R"))

# load the functions
source(here::here("all_functions.R"))
source(here::here("matern_functions.R"))

```



```{r}
# parameters
kappa <- 12
sigma <- 0.8
alpha <- 3
m <- 4
nu <- alpha - 0.5
tau <- sqrt(gamma(nu) / (sigma^2 * kappa^(2*nu) * (4*pi)^(1/2) * gamma(nu + 1/2)))
n.overkill <- 1000
ell <- 1

h <- 0.025

linear_mesh <- seq(0, ell, by = h)

e1 <- rbind(c(0,0), c(ell,0))#[c(2,1),]
e2 <- rbind(c(ell,0), c(ell,ell))
e3 <- rbind(c(ell,ell), c(0,ell))#[c(2,1),]
e4 <- rbind(c(0,ell), c(0,0))
e5 <- rbind(c(0,0), c(-ell,-ell)/sqrt(2))#[c(2,1),]
edges <- list(e1, e2, e3, e4, e5)

graphFEM <- metric_graph$new(edges = edges,
                          longlat = FALSE,
                          perform_merges = FALSE)

graph <- graphFEM$clone()

graphFEM$build_mesh(h = h)

mesh_XY <- graphFEM$mesh$V %>% as.data.frame()

mesh_locations <- graphFEM$get_mesh_locations() %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(dummy = 1) %>%
  rename(edge_number = V1, distance_on_edge = V2)

# add mesh locations as observations
graph$add_observations(
  data = mesh_locations,
  normalized = TRUE)

# add observations as vertices
graph$observation_to_vertex()

data <- graph$get_data()

order <- data %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  select(.coord_x, .coord_y) %>%
  rename(X = .coord_x, Y = .coord_y)


Approx_Sigma <- rat_covariance(
  graph = graph, 
  kappa = kappa, 
  tau = tau, 
  alpha = alpha, 
  m = m,
  type_rational_approx = "chebfun",
  type_interp = "spline",
  build_cov = TRUE)



digits <- 10

idx <- match(
  paste(round(mesh_XY$X, digits), 
        round(mesh_XY$Y, digits)),
  paste(round(order$X, digits), 
        round(order$Y, digits))
)

Approx_Sigma <- Approx_Sigma[idx, idx]

op <- matern.operators(alpha = alpha, 
                      kappa = kappa, 
                      tau = tau,
                      m = m, 
                      graph = graphFEM)

FEM_Sigma <- covariance_mesh(op)

noise <- rnorm(dim(Approx_Sigma)[1])
R <- chol(Approx_Sigma)
sample <- as.vector(t(R) %*% noise)


```



```{r}
VtE <- graphFEM$mesh$VtE %>% as.data.frame() %>% rename(edge_number = V1, distance_on_edge = V2) 
xy_mesh <- graphFEM$mesh$V %>% as.data.frame() %>% rename(x = X, y = Y)

all_data <- cbind(xy_mesh, VtE, noise = noise, sample = sample)

on_vertex <- all_data %>%
  slice((1:graphFEM$nV))
all_data_no_vertex <- all_data %>%
  slice(-(1:graphFEM$nV))

# Split by edge_number
edge_groups <- split(all_data_no_vertex, all_data_no_vertex$edge_number)


# Function to create a single edge block
create_edge_block <- function(edge_index) {
  start_v <- graphFEM$E[edge_index, 1]
  end_v   <- graphFEM$E[edge_index, 2]
  
  # Get edge data (assuming edge_index corresponds to the same index in edge_groups)
  edge_data <- edge_groups[[edge_index]]
  
  # Create NA row matching the number of columns
  na_row <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 1, ncol = ncol(on_vertex)))
  colnames(na_row) <- colnames(on_vertex)
  
  # Combine: start vertex, edge, end vertex, NA
  rbind(on_vertex[start_v, ],
        edge_data,
        on_vertex[end_v, ],
        na_row)
}

# Apply for all edges and combine
final_data <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(graphFEM$E)), create_edge_block))

final_data$trueEdge <- cumsum(is.na(final_data$x)) + 1
final_data$trueEdge[is.na(final_data$x)] <- NA

final_data$trueDist <- rep(c(linear_mesh, NA), graphFEM$nV)

```




```{r}
r_hat <- function(t1, t2, kappa, alpha, sigma, ell){
  nu <- alpha - 1/2
  r1_t1_0 <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = t1, t = 0, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  r1_t1_ell <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = t1, t = ell, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  
  r_0_0 <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = 0, t = 0, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  r_0_ell <- -sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = 0, t = ell, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  r_ell_0 <- -sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = ell, t = 0, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  r_ell_ell <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = 0, t = 0, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  
  r1_0_t2 <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = t2, t = 0, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  r1_ell_t2 <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = t2, t = ell, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha)
  
  
  cov <- sigma^2*matern.p.joint(s = t1, t = t2, kappa = kappa, p = 0, alpha = alpha) + cbind(r1_t1_0, r1_t1_ell) %*% solve(rbind(cbind(r_0_0, r_0_ell), cbind(r_ell_0, r_ell_ell)), rbind(r1_0_t2, r1_ell_t2))
  return(as.numeric(cov[1,1]))
}
```



```{r}
Sigma_hat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(linear_mesh), ncol = length(linear_mesh))
for (i in 1:length(linear_mesh)) {
  for (j in 1:length(linear_mesh)) {
    Sigma_hat[i,j] = r_hat(t1 = linear_mesh[i], t2 = linear_mesh[j], kappa = kappa, alpha = alpha, sigma = sigma, ell = ell)
  }
}

eps <- 1e-16
Sigma_hat <- Sigma_hat #+ diag(eps, nrow(Sigma_hat))

R = chol(Sigma_hat)

final_data$indSample <- NA

# loop over blocks (ignoring NA separators)
blocks <- split(seq_len(nrow(final_data)), final_data$trueEdge)

for (b in names(blocks)) {
  if (is.na(b)) next
  
  idx <- blocks[[b]]
  
  # extract noise vector for this block
  v <- final_data$noise[idx]
  
  #if(b%in%c(3,4,5)) v <- rev(v)
  
  # apply transformation
  res <- as.vector(t(R) %*% v)
  
  # store back
  final_data$indSample[idx] <- res
}

final_data$maxRange <- ifelse(
  abs(final_data$sample) >= abs(final_data$indSample),
  final_data$sample,
  final_data$indSample
)

final_data$maxPositive <- pmax(final_data$sample, final_data$indSample, na.rm = TRUE)
final_data$maxNegative <- pmin(final_data$sample, final_data$indSample, na.rm = TRUE)

```



```{r}

x_range <- range(final_data$x, na.rm = TRUE)*1.001
y_range <- range(final_data$y, na.rm = TRUE)*1.001
z_range <- range(final_data[, c("sample", "indSample")], na.rm = TRUE)*1.001

x_asp <- x_range[2] - x_range[1]
y_asp <- y_range[2] - y_range[1]
z_asp <- z_range[2] - z_range[1]

colaxnn <- "black"

z_vals <- as.vector(rbind(
  pmin(final_data$maxNegative, 0),
  pmax(final_data$maxPositive, 0),
  NA
))


p <- plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(data = final_data,
            x = ~x,
            y = ~y,
            z = ~y*0,
            type = "scatter3d", 
            mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
            showlegend = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = final_data,
            x = ~x,
            y = ~y,
            z = ~sample,
            type = "scatter3d", 
            mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
            showlegend = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = final_data,
            x = ~x,
            y = ~y,
            z = ~indSample,
            type = "scatter3d", 
            mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
            showlegend = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(
  x = rep(final_data$x, each = 3), 
  y = rep(final_data$y, each = 3), 
  z = z_vals,
  type = "scatter3d", 
  mode = "lines",
  line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
  showlegend = FALSE 
) |>
  config(mathjax = 'cdn') |>
  layout(font = list(family = "URW Palladio L"), #"Palatino Linotype"
            margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, b = 0, t = 0),
            scene = list(
              xaxis = list(title = list(text = "Longitude", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16),  range = x_range),
              yaxis = list(title = list(text = "Latitude", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16), range = y_range),
              zaxis = list(title = list(text = "", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16), range = z_range),
    aspectratio = list(x = x_asp, y = y_asp, z = 2),
    camera = list(eye = list(x = 2, y = -1, z = 2),
                            center = list(x = 0, y = 0, z = 0))
  )
)


p
```


# disconnected



```{r}

offset <- ell/4
FINAL_DATA <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    x = if_else(trueEdge == 1, x + 0*offset, x),
    y = if_else(trueEdge == 1, y - 1*offset, y),
    x = if_else(trueEdge == 2, x + 1*offset, x),
    y = if_else(trueEdge == 2, y + 0*offset, y),
    x = if_else(trueEdge == 3, x + 0*offset, x),
    y = if_else(trueEdge == 3, y + 1*offset, y),
    x = if_else(trueEdge == 4, x - 1*offset, x),
    y = if_else(trueEdge == 4, y + 0*offset, y),
    x = if_else(trueEdge == 5, x - 1*offset, x),
    y = if_else(trueEdge == 5, y - 1*offset, y)
  )
x_range <- range(FINAL_DATA$x, na.rm = TRUE)*1.001
y_range <- range(FINAL_DATA$y, na.rm = TRUE)*1.001
z_range <- range(FINAL_DATA[, c("sample", "indSample")], na.rm = TRUE)*1.001

x_asp <- x_range[2] - x_range[1]
y_asp <- y_range[2] - y_range[1]
z_asp <- z_range[2] - z_range[1]

colaxnn <- "black"

z_vals <- as.vector(rbind(
  pmin(FINAL_DATA$indSample, 0),
  pmax(FINAL_DATA$indSample, 0),
  NA
))


p <- plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(data = FINAL_DATA,
            x = ~x,
            y = ~y,
            z = ~y*0,
            type = "scatter3d", 
            mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
            showlegend = FALSE) |>
  # add_trace(data = final_data,
  #           x = ~x,
  #           y = ~y,
  #           z = ~y*0,
  #           type = "scatter3d", 
  #           mode = "lines",
  #           line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
  #           showlegend = FALSE) |>
  # add_trace(data = FINAL_DATA,
  #           x = ~x,
  #           y = ~y,
  #           z = ~sample,
  #           type = "scatter3d", 
  #           mode = "lines",
  #           line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
  #           showlegend = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = FINAL_DATA,
            x = ~x,
            y = ~y,
            z = ~indSample,
            type = "scatter3d", 
            mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
            showlegend = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(
  x = rep(FINAL_DATA$x, each = 3), 
  y = rep(FINAL_DATA$y, each = 3), 
  z = z_vals,
  type = "scatter3d", 
  mode = "lines",
  line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
  showlegend = FALSE 
) |>
  config(mathjax = 'cdn') |>
  layout(font = list(family = "URW Palladio L"), #"Palatino Linotype"
            margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, b = 0, t = 0),
            scene = list(
              xaxis = list(title = list(text = "Longitude", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16),  range = x_range),
              yaxis = list(title = list(text = "Latitude", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16), range = y_range),
              zaxis = list(title = list(text = "", font = list(color = colaxnn, size = 22)),  
                           tickfont = list(color = colaxnn, size = 16), range = z_range),
    aspectratio = list(x = x_asp, y = y_asp, z = 2),
    camera = list(eye = list(x = 2, y = -1, z = 2),
                            center = list(x = 0, y = 0, z = 0))
  )
)


p
```



```{r}
q <- graphFEM$plot_function(X = diag(Approx_Sigma), type = "plotly", line_color = "red", interpolate_plot = FALSE, name = "RAT", showlegend = TRUE)
graphFEM$plot_function(X = diag(FEM_Sigma), p = q, type = "plotly", line_color = "blue", interpolate_plot = FALSE, name = "FEM", showlegend = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)

offset <- ell/4

FINAL_DATA <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    x0 = x, y0 = y,
    
    x1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ x + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ x - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ x - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ y - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ y + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ y - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

n_frames <- 30
t_vals <- seq(1,0, length.out = n_frames)

ANIM_DATA <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(t_vals), function(i) {
  t <- t_vals[i]
  
  FINAL_DATA %>%
    mutate(
      frame = i,
      x = (1 - t)*x0 + t*x1,
      y = (1 - t)*y0 + t*y1
    )
}))

ANIM_DATA <- ANIM_DATA %>%
  group_by(frame) %>%
  mutate(
    zmin = pmin(indSample, 0),
    zmax = pmax(indSample, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

segments_df <- ANIM_DATA %>%
  group_by(frame) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    
    data.frame(
      frame = df$frame[1],
      x = rep(df$x, each = 3),
      y = rep(df$y, each = 3),
      z = as.vector(rbind(df$zmin, df$zmax, NA))
    )
  }) %>%
  bind_rows()

library(plotly)

p <- plot_ly() |>
  
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM_DATA,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~0,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM_DATA,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~indSample,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  add_trace(
    data = segments_df,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  layout(
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(range = x_range),
      yaxis = list(range = y_range),
      zaxis = list(range = z_range)
    ),
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        type = "buttons",
        buttons = list(
          list(method = "animate",
               args = list(NULL, list(frame = list(duration = 50, redraw = TRUE),
                                      transition = list(duration = 0))),
               label = "Play")
        )
      )
    )
  )
p
```




```{r}
FINAL_DATA <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    x0 = x,
    y0 = y,
    x1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ x + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ x - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ x - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ y - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ y + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ y - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

n_frames <- 60
t_vals <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_frames)

ANIM <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(t_vals), function(i) {
  t <- t_vals[i]
  
  if (t <= 0.5) {
    
    # --- PHASE 1: geometry only ---
    s <- t / 0.5
    
    FINAL_DATA %>%
      mutate(
        frame = i,
        
        x = (1 - s) * x1 + s * x0,
        y = (1 - s) * y1 + s * y0,
        
        z_sample = sample,
        z_ind    = indSample
      )
    
  } else {
    
    # --- PHASE 2: value morph ---
    s <- (t - 0.5) / 0.5
    
    FINAL_DATA %>%
      mutate(
        frame = i,
        
        x = x0,
        y = y0,
        
        z_sample = sample,
        z_ind    = (1 - s) * indSample + s * sample
      )
  }
}))


ANIM <- ANIM %>%
  mutate(
    zmin_all = pmin(z_sample, z_ind, 0),
    zmax_all = pmax(z_sample, z_ind, 0)
  )

SEGMENTS <- ANIM %>%
  group_by(frame) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    
    data.frame(
      frame = df$frame[1],
      x = rep(df$x, each = 3),
      y = rep(df$y, each = 3),
      z = as.vector(rbind(df$zmin_all, df$zmax_all, NA))
    )
  }) %>%
  bind_rows()

p <- plot_ly() |>
  
  # base plane
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~0,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # stationary sample
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z_sample,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # morphing curve
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z_ind,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # vertical segments (FIXED)
  add_trace(
    data = SEGMENTS,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
    showlegend = FALSE
  )

p
```

```{r}

FINAL_DATA <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    x0 = x,
    y0 = y,
    x1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ x + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ x - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ x - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ y - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ y + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ y - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

n_frames <- 60
t_vals <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_frames)

ANIM <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(t_vals), function(i) {
  t <- t_vals[i]
  
  FINAL_DATA %>%
    mutate(
      frame = i,
      
      # BLUE: fixed target geometry
      x_blue = x0,
      y_blue = y0,
      z_blue = sample,
      
      # RED: moving object
      x_red = (1 - t) * x1 + t * x0,
      y_red = (1 - t) * y1 + t * y0,
      
      # red field morph happens only after alignment
      z_red = if (t <= 0.5) {
        indSample
      } else {
        s <- (t - 0.5) / 0.5
        (1 - s) * indSample + s * sample
      }
    )
}))

ANIM <- ANIM %>%
  mutate(
    zmin_all = pmin(z_blue, z_red, 0),
    zmax_all = pmax(z_blue, z_red, 0)
  )

SEGMENTS <- ANIM %>%
  group_by(frame) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    
    data.frame(
      frame = df$frame[1],
      x = rep(df$x_blue, each = 3),   # anchor at final geometry
      y = rep(df$y_blue, each = 3),
      z = as.vector(rbind(df$zmin_all, df$zmax_all, NA))
    )
  }) %>%
  bind_rows()

p <- plot_ly() |>
  
  # base plane
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x_blue, y = ~y_blue, z = ~0,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # BLUE (stationary target)
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x_blue, y = ~y_blue, z = ~z_blue,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # RED (moving → morphing)
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x_red, y = ~y_red, z = ~z_red,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # vertical segments (must use same geometry as blue anchor)
  add_trace(
    data = SEGMENTS,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  config(mathjax = 'cdn') |>
  
  layout(
    font = list(family = "URW Palladio L"),
    margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, b = 0, t = 0),
    
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(range = x_range),
      yaxis = list(range = y_range),
      zaxis = list(range = z_range),
      
      aspectratio = list(x = x_asp, y = y_asp, z = 2),
      
      camera = list(
        eye = list(x = 2, y = -1, z = 2),
        center = list(x = 0, y = 0, z = 0)
      )
    )
  )

p
```




```{r}

FINAL_DATA <- final_data %>%
  mutate(
    x0 = x,
    y0 = y,
    x1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ x + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ x + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ x - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ x - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y1 = case_when(
      trueEdge == 1 ~ y - 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 2 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 3 ~ y + 1*offset,
      trueEdge == 4 ~ y + 0*offset,
      trueEdge == 5 ~ y - 1*offset,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

t_switch <- 0.5

n_frames <- 60
t_vals <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_frames)

ANIM <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(t_vals), function(i) {
  t <- t_vals[i]
  
  FINAL_DATA %>%
    mutate(
      frame = i,
      
      # BLUE fixed
      x_blue = x0,
      y_blue = y0,
      z_blue = sample,
      
      # SHARED rigid geometry
      x_move = if (t <= t_switch)
        (1 - t / t_switch) * x1 + (t / t_switch) * x0
      else x0,
      
      y_move = if (t <= t_switch)
        (1 - t / t_switch) * y1 + (t / t_switch) * y0
      else y0,
      
      # RED only differs in value
      z_red = if (t <= t_switch) {
        indSample
      } else {
        s <- (t - t_switch) / (1 - t_switch)
        (1 - s) * indSample + s * sample
      }
    )
}))

ANIM <- ANIM %>%
  mutate(
    zmin_all = pmin(z_blue, z_red, 0),
    zmax_all = pmax(z_blue, z_red, 0)
  )

SEGMENTS <- ANIM %>%
  group_by(frame) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    
    data.frame(
      frame = df$frame[1],
      x = rep(df$x_move, each = 3),
      y = rep(df$y_move, each = 3),
      z = as.vector(rbind(df$zmin_all, df$zmax_all, NA))
    )
  }) %>%
  bind_rows()

p <- plot_ly() |>
  
  # base plane
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x_blue, y = ~y_blue, z = ~0,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # BLUE (stationary target)
  add_trace(
    data = ANIM,
    x = ~x_blue, y = ~y_blue, z = ~z_blue,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "blue", width = 4),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  
  # RED (moving → morphing)
  add_trace(
  data = ANIM,
  x = ~x_move,
  y = ~y_move,
  z = ~z_red,
  frame = ~frame,
  type = "scatter3d",
  mode = "lines",
  line = list(color = "red", width = 4),
  showlegend = FALSE
) |>
  
  # vertical segments (must use same geometry as blue anchor)
  add_trace(
    data = SEGMENTS,
    x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
    frame = ~frame,
    type = "scatter3d",
    mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = "gray", width = 1),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  # RED BASE (moving rigid platform)
add_trace(
  data = ANIM,
  x = ~x_move,
  y = ~y_move,
  z = ~0,
  frame = ~frame,
  type = "scatter3d",
  mode = "lines",
  line = list(color = "black", width = 4),
  showlegend = FALSE
) |>
  
  config(mathjax = 'cdn') |>
  
  layout(
    font = list(family = "URW Palladio L"),
    margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, b = 0, t = 0),
    
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(range = x_range),
      yaxis = list(range = y_range),
      zaxis = list(range = z_range),
      
      aspectratio = list(x = x_asp, y = y_asp, z = 2),
      
      camera = list(
        eye = list(x = 2, y = -1, z = 2),
        center = list(x = 0, y = 0, z = 0)
      )
    )
  )

p
```
